reviews.review_description:
First, thank you developers for this game, please continue to improve the game play ,
Can I able to see my two hands to play the game if possible.
This is a simple game but it can get better too.  Because  I missed the basket too many time.   Please continue to improve the game play .

developer_response.body:
Hello bryanlo, 

I appreciate your review and suggestions. I am the only person developing this game and will add hands to the next iteration of it.

Thanks, 

Krishan

reviews.review_description: Poor graphics, erratic physics and not fun to play. Nothing like the Paper Toss game that so many of us have enjoyed on our iPhones.  This will require a great geal more development before it’s worth the dollar it now costs.

developer_response.body:
Hello therealrick,

I appreciate your feedback. This is solo made VR game so please bear with me while I make updates. I will be improving the graphics and optimising the physics in order to make the game more fun for you and other users. An update will be made and pushed out to your device soon. 

Thank you, 

Krishan

reviews.review_description: The World Rank mode allows you to compare your score with everyone else's globally!
